description: One view of your whole home's air health — radon, mold, particulates, CO2, VOC — aggregated from every sensor on your LAN, with a local history no single vendor app gives you.

novel_features.name: Whole-home air-health dashboard
novel_features.description: One mold/allergy-focused view of your entire home's air, aggregated across every sensor brand, over any time window.

novel_features.name: Per-room cross-source trend
novel_features.description: Min/avg/max per metric for a single room over a window, regardless of which vendor's sensor covers it.

novel_features.name: Unified room roster
novel_features.description: Every monitored room with its latest snapshot, merged across all sensor brands.
